title: Module Spend by Slot Type
query: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(BuyPrice), 0) AS total FROM ModuleBuy WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate
detailQuery: SELECT Slot AS label, COALESCE(SUM(BuyPrice), 0) AS value FROM ModuleBuy WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate GROUP BY Slot ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 20

details.text: {total} Cr spent on module purchases during the report period. Module spend is where the real outfitting investment lives — the slot breakdown reveals your build priorities: FSD upgrades signal range focus, weapons slots signal combat investment, shield generators signal survivability concerns.
details.help: ModuleBuy Slot is the hardpoint/optional slot identifier. total drives the title as the total outfitting expenditure.

tagLines: Module purchase expenditure compiled. Slot type spend distribution noted in the outfitting record.
The slots you spent the most on are the ones you care about most. The chart makes that explicit.
Outfitting credits go to the slots that define your build. The distribution is your build philosophy in numbers.
